name: Exchange Rate
description: FX rates for local-to-CHF conversion. Rates frozen on last business day of each month. Publication deadline: 1 business day after month-end. Sources: ECB (EUR), Bloomberg (USD, JPY). Owner: Group Treasury, Zurich. Missing or late rates block downstream consolidation. Change requests require 5 business days notice via Group Treasury portal.

content.description:
FX rates for local-to-CHF conversion.

**SLOs:**
- **Publication deadline:** 1 business day after month-end
- **Rate source:** ECB reference rates (EUR), Bloomberg (USD, JPY)
- **Owner:** Group Treasury, Zurich
- **Freeze policy:** Rates frozen on last business day of month — no retrospective changes
- **Change requests:** Via Group Treasury portal, minimum 5 business days notice
- **Fallback:** Missing or late rates block downstream consolidation — no silent fallback to stale values
